mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT(CAST(ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN u.occupancy_status = 'OCCUPIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS VARCHAR), '%'), '0%') AS occupancyPercentage, CONCAT('$', CAST(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(l.rent_amount) FROM pm_lease l WHERE l.is_deleted = FALSE AND l.lease_status = 'ACTIVE'), 0) AS VARCHAR)) AS revenueSummary, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN l2.end_date <= DATEADD('DAY', 60, CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM pm_lease l2 WHERE l2.is_deleted = FALSE), 0) AS expiringLeases, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.occupancy_status = 'VACANT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS vacantUnits, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN l3.approval_status NOT IN ('APPROVED', 'SIGNED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM pm_lease l3 WHERE l3.is_deleted = FALSE), 0) AS pendingApprovals FROM unit_master u WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE
